UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight her gentle curiosity, the dreamy longing in her eyes, and the connection to emotions through the fish cup.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the mermaid's youth or the physical details of the card, focusing instead on the emotional themes.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Cups card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-inspired ambient orchestral, harp, strings, flute, ethereal, hopeful, growth, major, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the naive and dreamy nature of the youngest prince, his distraction and disconnection from reality.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the royal aspect or the cup itself in this reversed orientation. Instead, focus on the prince's internal struggle and potential for romantic folly.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Cups card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-inspired ambient orchestral, harp, viola, oboe, minor, introspective, contemplative, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Cups card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the young Parsifal's emotional openness and curiosity as he navigates his emotions, symbolized by the half-emerging fish.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the clumsiness or awkwardness of the character, focusing instead on his potential for growth.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Cups card in an between position.
